---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
```{=html}
<style>
  .sailing-hero {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    min-height: 70vh;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .sailing-hero-left {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .sailing-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .sailing-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    line-height: 1;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
  .sailing-intro {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.8;
    max-width: 440px;
    margin-top: 28px;
  }
  .sailing-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 48px;
    padding-top: 48px;
  }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 42px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .sailing-hero-right {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .sailing-hero-right img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    display: block;
  }
  .sailing-section {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .section-label {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .section-label h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .section-label p {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-top: 8px;
    font-weight: 300;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .section-content {
    padding: 64px;
  }
  .section-content p {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.8;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .section-content img {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 560px;
    display: block;
    margin-top: 28px;
  }
  .img-caption {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .map-section {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .map-header {
    padding: 48px 48px 32px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .map-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
  .map-header p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-top: 8px;
    max-width: 480px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .timeline-section {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .timeline-label {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .timeline-label h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
  .timeline-content {
    padding: 64px;
  }
  .timeline-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
    gap: 32px;
    padding: 32px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.08);
    align-items: start;
  }
  .timeline-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.08); }
  .timeline-year {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: #2d4a3e;
    line-height: 1;
    padding-top: 4px;
  }
  .timeline-body h3 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .timeline-body p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .timeline-body img {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 480px;
    display: block;
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .timeline-caption {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-top: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    max-width: 480px;
  }
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="sailing-hero">
  <div class="sailing-hero-left">
    <div>
      <p class="sailing-eyebrow">Hobbies · Sailing</p>
      <h1 class="sailing-title">Sailing</h1>
      <p class="sailing-intro">One of my favorite hobbies is sailing. I started sailing when I was 8 years old and have been sailing ever since. Growing up in San Francisco, it gets super windy at times, which makes sailing there really fun!</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sailing-stats">
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">15+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years sailing</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">3</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Boats sailed</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">UCSB</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Sailing team</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sailing-hero-right">
    <img src="docs/ucsbsailing.jpg" alt="Sailing at UCSB"/>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SANTA BARBARA -->
<section class="sailing-section">
  <div class="section-label">
    <h2>Santa Barbara Harbor</h2>
    <p>UCSB Sailing Team</p>
  </div>
  <div class="section-content">
    <p>One of the things I love most about sailing in Santa Barbara is how amazing the wildlife is. I have seen dolphins, sea lions, and even whales while out on the water. The sunsets while sailing are also incredible. I love the sport and the community that comes with it.</p>
    <img src="docs/sealion.jpg" alt="Sea Lion laying on a dock in the Santa Barbara Harbor" style="width: 50%;"/>
    <p class="img-caption">Sea lion laying on a dock in the Santa Barbara Harbor</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MAP HEADER -->
<section class="map-section">
  <div class="map-header">
    <h2>Day in the life — Santa Barbara</h2>
    <p>Here is a map that shows where the team is on a typical day of practice. Click on each label to learn more about the team's practice locations.</p>
  </div>
</section>
```
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(leaflet)

leaflet(width = "100%", height = 480) |>
  addMiniMap(toggleDisplay = TRUE, minimized = TRUE) |>
  addTiles() |>
  setView(lng = -119.691933, lat = 34.408262, zoom = 15) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = c(-119.691934, -119.687761, -119.685117, -119.684933),
    lat = c(34.408263, 34.409213, 34.405995, 34.411735),
    popup = c(
      "UCSB Sailing Team Harbor, where we keep the boats, get ready for practice, and discuss logistics before getting on the water.",
      "Where our team does our initial drills until everyone is out on the water.",
      "Where we spend most of our practice and where we typically host races when we host other teams.",
      "If its too windy, we will practice in here to stay sheltered from heavy wind."
    )
  )
```
```{=html}
<!-- TIMELINE -->
<section class="timeline-section">
  <div class="timeline-label">
    <h2>Sailing through the years</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline-content">
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2018</div>
      <div class="timeline-body">
        <h3>High School</h3>
        <p>Sailing an FJ with my high school team in foggy San Francisco.</p>
        <img src="docs/hssailing.JPG" alt="High school sailing in San Francisco"/>
        <p class="timeline-caption">Sailing an FJ with my high school team in foggy San Francisco</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2020</div>
      <div class="timeline-body">
        <h3>COVID — Single-handed sailing</h3>
        <p>Because of the pandemic, we had to transition into single person boats to socially distance. I was so grateful to be able to continue my sport through COVID.</p>
        <img src="docs/lasersailing.jpeg" alt="Sailing Lasers in 2020"/>
        <p class="timeline-caption">Sailing Lasers in 2020</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2022</div>
      <div class="timeline-body">
        <h3>College Sailing at UCSB</h3>
        <p>Roll tacking in an FJ — a maneuver where we use body weight to help steer the boat through a tack, potentially gaining a small speed boost.</p>
        <img src="docs/ucsbsailing.jpg" alt="College sailing at UCSB"/>
        <p class="timeline-caption">Roll tacking in an FJ at UCSB</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
